Massachusetts Institute of Technology.description: MIT is one of the world's leading technology universities, recognized for engineering, computer science, artificial intelligence, scientific research, and entrepreneurship. The university focuses on solving global problems through innovation and advanced research.

Computer Science and Engineering.description: Focuses on programming, algorithms, artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, and software engineering. Students develop advanced computational solutions used in technology industries.

Electrical Engineering.description: Studies electronics, circuits, communication systems, and computer hardware. Students work with technologies involving robotics, computing, and digital systems.

Mechanical Engineering.description: Focuses on designing machines, robots, energy systems, and manufacturing technologies using physics and engineering principles.

Physics.description: Explores the fundamental laws of nature, including matter, energy, and the universe. Students develop analytical skills for research and technological applications.

Mathematics.description: Studies mathematical theories, modeling, statistics, and problem-solving methods applied to science, technology, and economics.

Biology.description: Examines living systems, genetics, and biotechnology. Students explore biological research connected to medicine and scientific innovation.

Business Analytics.description: Combines business strategy, statistics, and technology to analyze data and improve organizational decisions.

Finance.description: Studies investments, financial markets, and economic strategies used by companies and institutions.
